overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and elevated highways. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing dense urban architecture with holographic billboards and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with yellow crosswalk

events.description: turns left from the crosswalk toward the sidewalk under the elevated highway
moves from open intersection into covered sidewalk area beneath overpass

agents.ego_description: stands at the yellow crosswalk observing traffic, then turns left toward the sidewalk under the elevated structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic gray sedan driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
large concrete overpass structure with support columns
large holographic advertisement with purple neon lighting
tall modern building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, standing on a yellow striped crosswalk. Neon billboards illuminate the glass skyscrapers while a futuristic sedan drives through the wet streets. The camera turns left and moves toward a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway.

events.description: continues walking straight along the covered sidewalk passing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows overhead
gray concrete pedestrian walkway with visible seams
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
tall pole with bright white lamp illuminating the sidewalk
vertical red neon sign with samurai imagery
black garbage bags piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the scene is darker and more enclosed with artificial street lighting. The concrete sidewalk is lined with a metal railing on the right and trash bags on the left. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera moves steadily forward under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon billboards and street traffic

events.description: approaches intersection with yellow crosswalk markings visible ahead
steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall vertical red neon advertisement sign
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the sidewalk opens up to reveal more of the city with neon billboards and palm trees visible. The camera walks past pedestrians and approaches an intersection, then steps onto the yellow crosswalk to cross the wet street while traffic passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open intersection surrounded by skyscrapers

events.description: enters large open plaza area surrounded by towering residential skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with blue underglow driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide open wet street reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall cylindrical apartment building with many illuminated windows
structure with prominent vertical red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast urban plaza surrounded by towering glass residential buildings. The camera crosses the wide wet intersection where the asphalt reflects the myriad neon signs and streetlights. Futuristic vehicles with colored underglow pass by as the walk continues through the heart of the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit city intersection through a shadowed underpass and back into a sprawling, luminous urban plaza. It begins on a yellow striped crosswalk amidst glass skyscrapers and glowing billboards, moving left toward a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. As the camera enters this enclosed space, the environment shifts to a darker, industrial atmosphere lined with metal railings and trash bags while pedestrians pass in the opposite direction. The scene then opens back up as the camera exits the overpass, passing palm trees and neon signs before stepping onto another wet crosswalk. Finally, the view expands into a vast plaza surrounded by towering residential buildings, where the asphalt reflects a myriad of neon lights and futuristic vehicles with colored underglow glide past.
